headline: A Look At Federal Realty (FRT) Valuation After Congressional North Shopping Center Acquisition
summary: Why the Congressional North acquisition matters for FRT shareholders Federal Realty Investment Trust (FRT) just agreed to buy the Congressional North Shopping Center in Montgomery County, Maryland, for US$72.3 million, expanding its cluster of grocery anchored retail assets along Rockville Pike. See our latest analysis for Federal Realty Investment Trust. At a share price of US$103.15, FRT has had a softer patch recently, with a 30 day share price return of a 2.18% decline.
